summary: P7 frontend UI, deployable dist, backend CORS support, nginx same-origin API deployment semantics and frontend-backend combination E2E are complete. The browser frontend defaults to /api/v1 same-origin calls and no longer exposes a user-facing API address panel. Auth /me now returns platform roles and permissions so platform_admin can be recognized by the frontend as PLAT_SUPER_ADMIN. The project is ready for user trial deployment after nginx preserves the /api prefix and proxies API docs routes.

deferredRisks.reason: Create-system idempotency still uses single-JVM memory storage. Production multi-instance consistency needs shared storage or a database idempotency table.
npm ci reports 2 moderate audit items. No npm audit fix --force was applied because it may force dependency upgrades; schedule dependency governance after trial deployment.
OpenAPI nonce replay, IP whitelist, OpenAPI idempotency conflict and high-concurrency scenarios remain recommended before production launch.

verification: npm.cmd run build passed and generated frontend/dist
backend health endpoint returned COMMON_OK and UP
browser frontend login through AUTH-002 succeeded
browser frontend typed SDK call to PLAT-001 returned COMMON_OK
nginx deploy guide added at docs/deploy/nginx-deploy.md
deployed 192.168.0.211:19999 was diagnosed as stripping /api and routing /doc.html to frontend index; nginx config must be updated before retest
AUTH-005 /me returns platformRoles and platformPermissions; examine-plat -am test passed
frontend navigation and primary route titles are Chinese by default; npm.cmd run build passed
